title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at StayVista - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at StayVista - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
StayVista invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StayVista:
StayVista is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StayVista!
